description:
Taken from the 1971 Honinbo 
Tournament played between
Rin Kaiho 9p (Honinbo) and
Ishida Yoshi 7p (Challenger).

Ishida won the series 4-2 to become 
the youngest Honinbo ever at an age of 22.

A present day picture of Ishida Yoshi 
can be seen on my personal 
goproblems.com page.
